summary: Marketing Comments Feature - All tests passed. Backend: 20/20 tests passed (100%). Frontend: CommentThread component verified in both EventPanel and MarketingPostDetail. Comments display author name, avatar initials, timestamp. Post and delete functionality working. 'Marketing Team - Tasks & Requests' label visible in EventPanel.

issues: Console warning: Missing `Description` or `aria-describedby={undefined}` for {DialogContent} - minor accessibility issue

success_rate.frontend: 100% - All UI elements and integrations verified

seed_data_creation: Test comments created during testing (TEST_Playwright_Event_Comment_123, TEST_Playwright_Post_Comment_456, etc.)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Marketing Comments feature fully tested. Key components: 1) CommentThread component (data-testid='comment-thread') used in both EventPanel and MarketingPostDetail. 2) Comment input (data-testid='comment-input') and post button (data-testid='post-comment-btn'). 3) Delete button (data-testid='delete-comment-{id}') appears on hover for author's own comments. 4) Backend endpoints: GET/POST /api/marketing/comments/{entity_type}/{entity_id}, DELETE /api/marketing/comments/{comment_id}. 5) entity_type must be 'post' or 'event'. 6) Comments stored in 'marketing_comments' MongoDB collection. 7) Test event ID: 7e26e41d-653c-4685-b748-eb76a8208872, Test post ID: c3a6b8d5-5e81-4060-ac99-7f2cb8f8005b.

Frontend_UI_Tests.CommentThread_in_PostDetail: PASSED - CommentThread found below Platform Links

Frontend_UI_Tests.Delete_button_implementation: PASSED - Delete button appears on hover for author's comments
